base_version: v1.4 (SKILL.md unchanged, R5 research data added)

methodology.description: 5-agent evaluation of v1.4 SKILL.md with R5 research data (6/13-22, 58 articles) injected into prompts. Compare against v1.4 full_test baseline scores.
methodology.prompt_mode: SKILL.core.md (240行) + R5 关键数据点注入

case_12_model9.note: R5新增 Claude蒸馏自我 事件引用，丰富度提升但核心行为不变

case_13_h14.note: R5新增 铜冠铜箔20倍方法论+材料怕高 引用，框架深度增强

case_14_h15h16.note: R5新增 材料→锂电有色切换+被套三原则+择时精度 引用

case_5_emotion.note: 不在v1.4 full_test范围内。R5新增 菜就多练语气+被套三原则 增强

case_19_framework.note: 轻微回归(-1)——agent未像v1.4那样完整展开孙子兵法引用和数学公式，但R5被套三原则+左侧阶梯建仓作为新内容出现

summary.conclusion: R5 research data enriches output with new context (铜冠铜箔20倍/材料怕高/被套三原则/Claude蒸馏自我) but does not materially change scores. dim8 stable at 9.0. Total score stable at 79.2.

key_finding: SKILL.md unchanged since v1.4 → scores stable. R5 data adds contextual richness but core behavior is preserved. This validates the skill architecture: updates to references/ research files don't break the agent prompt behavior.
